skills.name: bulkrna-batch-correction
skills.description: Batch effect correction for multi-cohort bulk RNA-seq data using ComBat, with PCA-based visualization before and after correction.

skills.name: bulkrna-coexpression
skills.description: WGCNA-style weighted gene co-expression network analysis — module detection, soft thresholding, hub genes.

skills.name: bulkrna-de
skills.description: Differential expression analysis via PyDESeq2 with Welch's t-test fallback — volcano plots, MA plots, p-value diagnostics.

skills.name: bulkrna-deconvolution
skills.description: Bulk RNA-seq cell type deconvolution using NNLS (built-in), with optional CIBERSORTx and MuSiC bridges.

skills.name: bulkrna-enrichment
skills.description: Pathway enrichment analysis for bulk RNA-seq — ORA and GSEA via GSEApy, with built-in hypergeometric fallback.

skills.name: bulkrna-geneid-mapping
skills.description: Gene identifier conversion between Ensembl, Entrez, HGNC symbols, and UniProt for bulk RNA-seq count matrices.

skills.name: bulkrna-ppi-network
skills.description: Protein-protein interaction network analysis from DEG lists — STRING API query, graph construction, hub gene identification.

skills.name: bulkrna-qc
skills.description: Bulk RNA-seq count matrix quality control — library sizes, gene detection, sample correlation, outlier detection, CPM normalization.

skills.name: bulkrna-read-alignment
skills.description: RNA-seq read alignment and quantification statistics — STAR/HISAT2/Salmon log parsing, mapping rate, unique/multi-mapped reads, library strandedness, gene body coverage.

skills.name: bulkrna-read-qc
skills.description: FASTQ quality assessment for bulk RNA-seq — Phred scores, GC content, adapter detection, read length distribution, Q20/Q30 rates.

skills.name: bulkrna-splicing
skills.description: Alternative splicing analysis — PSI quantification, differential splicing event detection from rMATS/SUPPA2 output.

skills.name: bulkrna-survival
skills.description: Survival analysis for bulk RNA-seq — Kaplan-Meier curves, Cox proportional hazards, expression-based patient stratification.

skills.name: bulkrna-trajblend
skills.description: Bulk-to-single-cell trajectory interpolation — uses VAE and GNN to bridge bulk RNA-seq with single-cell reference data, generating synthetic single-cell profiles and embedding bulk samples into developmental trajectories.

skills.name: genomics-alignment
skills.description: Alignment statistics from SAM/BAM files: mapping rate, MAPQ distribution, insert size, duplicate rate, proper pair rate. Mirrors samtools-flagstat.

skills.name: genomics-assembly
skills.description: Genome assembly quality assessment: N50/N90/L50/L90 (QUAST-compatible), GC content, contig length distribution, completeness estimation. Wraps SPAdes, Megahit, Flye, Canu.

skills.name: genomics-cnv-calling
skills.description: Copy number variant detection from exome/WGS data using CNVkit, Control-FREEC, or GATK gCNV. Supports tumor-normal pairs, tumor-only, and germline modes.

skills.name: genomics-epigenomics
skills.description: Epigenomics analysis including ATAC-seq peak calling with MACS3, ChIP-seq analysis, motif enrichment, and chromatin accessibility.

skills.name: genomics-phasing
skills.description: Haplotype phasing analysis: phase block N50, phased fraction, PS (Phase Set) field parsing, pipe-delimited genotype detection. Wraps WhatsHap, SHAPEIT5, Eagle2.

skills.name: genomics-qc
skills.description: FASTQ quality control: Phred quality scores, GC/N content, Q20/Q30 rates, per-base quality profiles, read length distribution, and adapter contamination detection.

skills.name: genomics-sv-detection
skills.description: Structural variant detection (DEL/DUP/INV/TRA): SV VCF parsing with BND notation, size classification (50bp-10Mb), evidence types. Wraps Manta, Lumpy, Delly, Sniffles.

skills.name: genomics-variant-annotation
skills.description: Variant functional impact prediction: VEP consequence types (HIGH/MODERATE/LOW/MODIFIER), SIFT, PolyPhen-2, and CADD scoring. Rule-based annotation engine for demo, wraps VEP/snpEff/ANNOVAR.

skills.name: genomics-variant-calling
skills.description: Germline and somatic variant calling (SNVs, Indels) using GATK HaplotypeCaller, Mutect2, DeepVariant, or FreeBayes. Includes GVCF workflow, VQSR, and hard filtering.

skills.name: genomics-vcf-operations
skills.description: VCF operations: multi-allelic parsing, variant classification (SNP/MNP/INS/DEL/COMPLEX), Ti/Tv ratio, QUAL/DP filtering, INFO field parsing. Mirrors bcftools stats.

skills.name: literature
skills.description: Parse scientific literature (PDFs, URLs, DOIs) to extract GEO accessions, metadata, and datasets. Use when users provide a paper and want to automatically extract data sources for downstream omics analysis.

skills.name: metabolomics-annotation
skills.description: Metabolite annotation and structural identification using SIRIUS, CSI:FingerID, GNPS, or MetFrag.

skills.name: metabolomics-de
skills.description: Metabolomics differential analysis using univariate tests (t-test, FDR), multivariate methods (PCA, PLS-DA, OPLS-DA, sPLS-DA), Random Forest, and ROC analysis for biomarker discovery.

skills.name: metabolomics-normalization
skills.description: Metabolomics data normalization, scaling and transformation.

skills.name: metabolomics-pathway-enrichment
skills.description: Metabolomics pathway analysis using MetaboAnalystR (KEGG, Reactome), pathview visualization, MSEA, mummichog, and network-based topology analysis.

skills.name: metabolomics-peak-detection
skills.description: Peak picking, feature detection, alignment and grouping using XCMS, MZmine 3, or MS-DIAL.

skills.name: metabolomics-quantification
skills.description: Feature quantification, missing value imputation, and normalization for metabolomics data.

skills.name: metabolomics-statistics
skills.description: Statistical analysis for metabolomics — PCA, PLS-DA, clustering, and univariate tests.

skills.name: metabolomics-xcms-preprocessing
skills.description: XCMS3 workflow for LC-MS/GC-MS metabolomics preprocessing. Peak detection (CentWave/MatchedFilter), RT alignment (Obiwarp), correspondence, gap filling, and CAMERA adduct/isotope annotation.

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Multi-omics query routing and pipeline orchestration across all OmicsClaw domains. Routes natural language queries to the correct analysis skill across spatial transcriptomics, single-cell omics, genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics.

skills.name: omics-skill-builder
skills.description: Create OmicsClaw-native skill scaffolds for new reusable workflows that are not yet represented in the current skill catalog.

skills.name: proteomics-data-import
skills.description: Import and convert proteomics data formats between MaxQuant, DIA-NN, Spectronaut, and standard CSV.

skills.name: proteomics-de
skills.description: Differential protein abundance testing using MSstats, limma, proDA, and scipy/statsmodels for Python. Multiple testing correction with BH FDR.

skills.name: proteomics-enrichment
skills.description: Pathway, network, and functional enrichment for proteomics using STRING, DAVID, or g:Profiler.

skills.name: proteomics-identification
skills.description: Database search for peptide/protein identification using MaxQuant, MS-GF+, Comet, or Mascot.

skills.name: proteomics-ms-qc
skills.description: Mass spectrometry raw data quality control using PTXQC, rawTools, or MSstatsQC.

skills.name: proteomics-ptm
skills.description: Post-translational modification analysis including phosphorylation, acetylation, and ubiquitination. Site localization, motif analysis, and quantitative PTM analysis with MSstatsPTM.

skills.name: proteomics-quantification
skills.description: Protein/peptide quantification (LFQ, TMT, DIA) using MaxQuant LFQ, DIA-NN, or Skyline.

skills.name: proteomics-structural
skills.description: Structural proteomics and cross-linking MS analysis using XlinkX, pLink, or xiSEARCH.

skills.name: scatac-preprocessing
skills.description: Single-cell ATAC-seq preprocessing with a Signac-style TF-IDF + LSI workflow. Performs cell and peak filtering, top-peak selection, TF-IDF normalization, latent semantic indexing, neighborhood graph construction, UMAP, and Leiden clustering, then exports a downstream-ready AnnData plus a standard OmicsClaw gallery and reproducibility bundle.

skills.name: sc-ambient-removal
skills.description: Remove ambient RNA contamination from droplet-based single-cell RNA-seq using a simple subtraction path, CellBender, or SoupX. The wrapper exposes only the parameters that are actually wired into the current implementation.

skills.name: sc-batch-integration
skills.description: Integrate multi-sample scRNA-seq data with Harmony, scVI, scANVI, BBKNN, Scanorama, or supported R-backed integration methods.

skills.name: sc-cell-annotation
skills.description: Annotate cell types from preprocessed scRNA-seq data using marker scoring, CellTypist, SingleR, or scmap through the shared Python/R backends.

skills.name: sc-cell-communication
skills.description: Cell-cell communication analysis for annotated scRNA-seq data using a built-in ligand-receptor scorer, LIANA, CellPhoneDB, or a CellChat R path.

skills.name: sc-count
skills.description: Default 10x scRNA counting route. Turn FASTQ or existing Cell Ranger / STARsolo outputs into a downstream-ready standardized AnnData.

skills.name: sc-de
skills.description: Differential expression for single-cell RNA-seq using Scanpy marker tests or an R-backed DESeq2 pseudobulk path. The wrapper separates exploratory cluster-level marker ranking from sample-aware pseudobulk analysis.

skills.name: sc-differential-abundance
skills.description: Sample-aware differential abundance and compositional analysis for scRNA-seq using Milo, scCODA, or an exploratory proportion-based fallback.

skills.name: sc-doublet-detection
skills.description: Detect putative doublets in single-cell RNA-seq data using Scrublet, DoubletFinder, or scDblFinder. The wrapper standardizes output columns and keeps the public parameter surface compact.

skills.name: sc-enrichment
skills.description: Single-cell gene-set activity scoring for annotated scRNA-seq data using the official AUCell Bioconductor implementation.

skills.name: sc-fastq-qc
skills.description: Start here if you have raw single-cell FASTQ files. Checks read quality before counting with FastQC and MultiQC when available, plus a stable local fallback summary.

skills.name: sc-filter
skills.description: Filter cells and genes from single-cell RNA-seq AnnData objects using QC-derived thresholds or tissue presets. This wrapper removes low-quality cells/genes but does not normalize, cluster, or annotate the dataset.

skills.name: sc-gene-programs
skills.description: Discover de novo gene programs and per-cell usage scores from scRNA-seq data using cNMF-compatible or NMF workflows.

skills.name: sc-grn
skills.description: Infer gene regulatory networks from scRNA-seq using the pySCENIC workflow: GRNBoost2 for adjacency inference, cisTarget-style motif pruning, and AUCell regulon scoring.

skills.name: sc-markers
skills.description: Find cluster marker genes from single-cell data using Scanpy-backed Wilcoxon, t-test, or logistic-regression ranking.

skills.name: sc-metacell
skills.description: Compress scRNA-seq data into metacell-level summaries using SEACells or a lightweight k-means aggregation fallback.

skills.name: sc-multi-count
skills.description: Use this only for Cell Ranger multi, CITE-seq, ADT, or HTO-style multimodal 10x data. Preserves the multimodal object and also exports an RNA-only handoff.

skills.name: sc-preprocessing
skills.description: Main preprocessing step after counts and QC. Filters cells, normalizes expression, selects HVGs, and runs PCA, UMAP, and clustering.

skills.name: sc-pseudoalign-count
skills.description: Alternative counting route if you explicitly want SimpleAF / Alevin-fry or kb-python instead of Cell Ranger / STARsolo, with the same standardized AnnData handoff.

skills.name: sc-pseudotime
skills.description: Trajectory analysis for single-cell RNA-seq using Scanpy DPT or Palantir, plus a configurable correlation method for ranking trajectory-associated genes.

skills.name: sc-qc
skills.description: Review cell quality before filtering. Computes counts, detected genes, mitochondrial percentage, and ribosomal percentage, but does not remove cells.

skills.name: sc-standardize-input
skills.description: Start here if you already have an external single-cell h5ad. Fixes the AnnData contract so downstream OmicsClaw scRNA skills can use it safely.

skills.name: sc-velocity
skills.description: Run scVelo on a velocity-ready h5ad using stochastic, dynamical, or steady-state modes. Use `sc-velocity-prep` first if spliced/unspliced layers are missing.

skills.name: sc-velocity-prep
skills.description: Start here for RNA velocity when you have Cell Ranger BAM, loom, or STARsolo Velocyto output. Creates the spliced and unspliced layers needed by scVelo.

skills.name: spatial-annotate
skills.description: Cell type annotation for spatial transcriptomics data using Scanpy marker-gene overlap scoring, Tangram mapping, scANVI transfer, or CellAssign probabilistic models.

skills.name: spatial-cnv
skills.description: Infer copy number variation programs from spatial transcriptomics data using inferCNVpy or Numbat, with method-aware matrix selection, reference controls, and spatially mappable CNV summaries.

skills.name: spatial-communication
skills.description: Cell-cell communication analysis for spatial transcriptomics using LIANA, CellPhoneDB, FastCCC, or CellChat, with method-specific parameter hints and standardized ligand-receptor outputs.

skills.name: spatial-condition
skills.description: Compare experimental conditions in spatial transcriptomics data using pseudobulk differential expression with method-aware PyDESeq2 or Wilcoxon testing and explicit replicate handling.

skills.name: spatial-de
skills.description: Differential expression and marker discovery for spatial transcriptomics using Scanpy Wilcoxon / t-test or sample-aware pseudobulk PyDESeq2.

skills.name: spatial-deconv
skills.description: Cell type deconvolution for spatial transcriptomics using FlashDeconv, Cell2location, RCTD, DestVI, Stereoscope, Tangram, SPOTlight, or CARD, with method-specific parameter hints and standardized proportion outputs.

skills.name: spatial-domains
skills.description: Identify tissue regions and spatial niches from preprocessed spatial transcriptomics data using Leiden, Louvain, SpaGCN, STAGATE, GraphST, BANKSY, or CellCharter.

skills.name: spatial-enrichment
skills.description: Pathway and gene-set enrichment analysis for spatial transcriptomics using ORA-style enrichr, preranked GSEA, or ssGSEA with local-first gene-set resolution and method-aware parameter controls.

skills.name: spatial-genes
skills.description: Find genes with spatially variable expression patterns using Moran's I, SpatialDE, SPARK-X, or FlashS. Identifies genes whose expression is non-randomly distributed across tissue coordinates.

skills.name: spatial-integrate
skills.description: Multi-sample integration and batch correction for spatial transcriptomics data using Harmony, BBKNN, or Scanorama.

skills.name: spatial-microenvironment-subset
skills.description: Extract a local spatial microenvironment by selecting cells or spots within a physical radius of a center population, preserving coordinates and labels in a downstream-ready h5ad subset for tumor microenvironment, neighborhood, spatial communication, and related downstream analyses.

skills.name: spatial-preprocess
skills.description: Load raw spatial transcriptomics data (Visium, Xenium, or converted h5ad inputs), run the current OmicsClaw scanpy-standard preprocessing workflow, and export a downstream-ready AnnData with explicit effective QC parameters plus a standardized preprocessing visualization contract.

skills.name: spatial-register
skills.description: Spatial registration and multi-slice alignment for spatial transcriptomics data using PASTE or STalign, with method-specific parameter hints, standardized aligned-coordinate outputs, and a unified registration visualization contract.

skills.name: spatial-statistics
skills.description: Spatial statistics for spatial transcriptomics using neighborhood enrichment, Ripley's statistics, co-occurrence, Moran/Geary autocorrelation, local Moran, Getis-Ord Gi*, bivariate Moran, and spatial graph centrality summaries.

skills.name: spatial-trajectory
skills.description: Trajectory inference and pseudotime analysis for spatial transcriptomics using DPT, CellRank, or Palantir, with method-specific parameter hints and standardized trajectory outputs.

skills.name: spatial-velocity
skills.description: RNA velocity and cellular dynamics analysis for spatial transcriptomics using scVelo stochastic / deterministic / dynamical models or VELOVI, with method-aware preprocessing, graph, training controls, and a standardized OmicsClaw gallery + figure_data output contract.
